metaDescription: Order custom crayons in bulk for schools, events, and promotions. Personalize with your logo. Fast turnaround and low minimums at Perfect Imprints.
introHtml:
Back-to-school season is the perfect time to order custom crayons. Whether you're creating welcome kits for new hires, packing giveaway bags for a trade show, or assembling art supplies for a community event, personalized crayons make a colorful and practical impression.

From the classic Mateo and Varsala crayons to the sleek Cali Pen and Dart Pen, our selection covers every budget and style. Choose from standard or jumbo sizes, vibrant color assortments, and eco-friendly options. Each crayon can be imprinted with your logo or message using screen printing, hot stamping, or full-color wrap printing.

Perfect Imprints makes ordering easy for bulk buyers. No complex minimums — we work with orders as small as 100 pieces and scale up to thousands. Lead times are typically 5–7 business days after approval, and we offer free samples so you can see and feel the quality before committing. Ready to color your brand's next campaign?

faqs.q: What is the minimum order quantity for custom crayons?
faqs.a: Minimum order quantities vary by product. For most crayon styles like the Mateo or Cali Pen, we require at least 100 pieces. Larger quantities reduce the per-unit cost. Contact us for specific MOQs on premium items.

faqs.q: What decoration methods are available for crayons?
faqs.a: We offer screen printing, hot stamping, and full-color wrap printing. Screen printing works best for simple logos and text, while full-color wraps allow for detailed artwork. Hot stamping gives a metallic foil finish.

faqs.q: Can I get a sample before placing a bulk order?
faqs.a: Yes, we provide free samples of our crayons. You can request an unprinted sample to check color and size, or a pre-production sample with your artwork for approval. Samples ship within 2–3 days.

faqs.q: What sizes and colors do custom crayons come in?
faqs.a: Our crayons range from standard 3.5-inch to jumbo 4.5-inch lengths. Color assortments include 8, 16, or 24 packs, and you can choose custom color mixes. Popular options include neon, metallic, and skin tone sets.

faqs.q: What is the typical lead time for custom crayon orders?
faqs.a: Standard production takes 5–7 business days after artwork approval. Rush orders are available for an additional fee, reducing lead time to 2–3 business days. Shipping time depends on your location.

heroAltText: Assorted custom crayons with printed logos in bright colors, arranged on a white background
